assignments.name: lyricsText
assignments.value:
Heaven & Earth - COG Worship (D)

INTRO:
Tara!
Na na na na
Nananana(3x)

VERSE 1:
Heto na ang hinihintay
Na maranasan Kang tunay
Sigaw ng puso at damdamin
Ikaw ay purihin

CHORUS:
God of all heaven and earth
You have been with me through it all
Your goodness and mercy overflow
